======= RMA00456Franklin Cuthbert Cornell family papers1-1-456Compiled by Alexandra C. LipskyDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Franklin Cuthbert Cornell family papers
Cornell, Franklin Cuthbert.
1-1-456
2.2 cubic feet. 2.2 cubic feet.
1857-1938. Correspondence, account books, ledgers, finacial documents, clippings, photogrpahs, legal documents. Family papers, correspondence, and miscellaneous items concerning Franklin C. Cornell and son, Franklin C. Cornell, Jr. Collection material in English 2094177
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Alexandra C. Lipsky
Date completed:
August 1989
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, September 2003
Date modified:
RMC Staff, December 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Family papers, including financial and legal documents, stock certificates, indentures, public foreclosures, judgements, estate settlements (concerning Cornell and his father, Ezra Cornell), title abstracts, promissory notes, cash and farm account books, receipts, checks and check stubs. There are also personal letters, including some from his wife Susannah Pettigrove Cornell; genealogical items; scrapbook of newspaper clippings; and photographs. Miscellaneous items include a manuscript copy of a contract for sale of property by Cornell to Jennie McGraw; accounts paid for Mary Ann Cornell's house; and a Supreme Court brief on the lawsuit brought by Cornell against the Utica, Ithaca, and Elmira Railway Company. The collection also contains papers of Franklin Cornell, Jr., including student notebooks from Cornell University, personal and business correspondence, diaries, and financial and legal documents.
Cite As:
Franklin Cuthbert Cornell papers, #1-1-456. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Real property -- New York (State) -- Tompkins County. Cornell, Ezra, 1807-1874. Cornell, Susannah Pettigrove. Fiske, Jennie McGraw, 1840-1881. Cornell, Franklin Cuthbert, Jr. Cornell, Ezra, II, 1864-1902. Utica, Ithaca, and Elmira Railroad Cornell University -- : Students.
